# All Basic Questions


2025-02-25

Total Points: 12

Collect the basic version of each question type.

---

---

**Question 1** (0 Points)

Essay: Basic

Write your response below.

```

```


---

**Question 2** (1 Points)

Fill in Multiple Blanks: Basic -- <placeholder>A</placeholder> <placeholder>B</placeholder> <placeholder>C</placeholder> <placeholder>D</placeholder>

For each part, fill in the associated blank:

A:    `1`  
B:    `2`  
C:    `3`  
D:    `4`  


---

**Question 3** (1.5 Points)

Short Answer / Fill in The Blank: Basic

Fill in the blank below:

```
1
```


---

**Question 4** (2 Points)

Multiple Answers: Basic

Choose all that apply:

A. A *(correct)*  
B. B *(correct)*  
C. C  
D. D  


---

**Question 5** (2.25 Points)

Matching: Basic

Match each item on the left with a letter from the right.

| Left | Right |
|------|-------|
| A | A. 1 |
| B | B. 2 |
| C | C. 3 |
| | D. 4 |
| | E. 5 |
| | F. 6 |

A: *A. 1*  
B: *B. 2*  
C: *C. 3*  


---

**Question 6** (0.75 Points)

Multiple Choice: Basic

Choose one:

A. A *(correct)*  
B. B  
C. C  
D. D  


---

**Question 7** (1.5 Points)

Multiple Drop Downs: Basic <placeholder>part1</placeholder> and <placeholder>part2</placeholder>

For each part, choose one:

part1:  
A. a *(correct)*  
B. b  
C. c  

part2:  
A. 1 *(correct)*  
B. 2  
C. 3  



---

**Question 8** (1 Points)

Basic Number Question with All Answer Types

Provide a numerical answer below:


```
0.08
0.08 ± 0.01
[0.07, 0.09]
0.08 (2 decimal places)
```


---

Write your answer below.

```

```

**Question 10** (0 Points)

Text-Only: Basic

**Question 11** (1 Points)

True/False: True

Choose one:

A. True *(correct)*  
B. False
